locations.name: Samar Island Natural Park
locations.summary: The Samar Island Natural Park, in Samar, is the largest contiguous tract of old-growth forest in the Philippines.

relations.subject: Visayan blue fantail
relations.evidence: Occurs in a few protected areas like Rajah Sikatuna Protected Landscape in Bohol and Samar Island Natural Park but actual protection and enforcement from illegal logging and hunting are lax
